apac.pageDescription: Discover the SMART on FHIR market opportunity in Asia-Pacific
apac.heroTitle: Asia-Pacific: The New Frontier of Digital Health
apac.heroSubtitle: Home to 60% of the world's population, Asia-Pacific is at a critical inflection point for health interoperability

painPoints.title: Three Core Challenges
painPoints.subtitle: Structural challenges facing APAC healthcare systems

pain1.title: Data Fragmentation
pain1.description: Over 90% of APAC healthcare facilities use incompatible information systems. When patients visit different hospitals, records cannot be shared automatically — leading to duplicate tests, lost information, and medical errors.

pain2.title: Aging Population
pain2.description: By 2050, APAC's 65+ population will exceed 1.3 billion — double the current figure. Chronic disease management and long-term care demand seamless cross-institutional data flow.

pain3.title: Rising Healthcare Costs
pain3.description: APAC healthcare spending grows 7-10% annually, far exceeding GDP growth. Redundant system builds and manual data integration waste billions of dollars each year.
